channel.title: PingPaid Hub — Free Business Tools for Freelancers
channel.description: 133+ free calculators, guides, templates, and resources for freelancers and small businesses. No signup required.

item.title: How to Write an Invoice (Step-by-Step + Free Template)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to writing professional invoices. Includes free template, essential elements, and best practices.

item.title: Client Won't Pay? 7-Step Recovery Plan
item.description: What to do when a client won't pay. Escalation ladder, legal options, and scripts that actually work.

item.title: Best Invoicing Software 2026 — 10 Tools Ranked
item.description: Honest comparison of 10 invoicing tools. Feature matrix, pricing table, and PingPaid ranks #1 for collection.

item.title: Cash Flow Calculator for Freelancers
item.description: Monthly cash flow projection: income minus expenses minus late payment impact. Plan ahead.

item.title: ROI Calculator — What If You Used PingPaid?
item.description: Time saved × hourly rate = your annual ROI. See how much PingPaid could save you.

item.title: Invoice Software for Designers
item.description: Brand consistency, portfolio integration, revision rounds, multi-currency, auto-follow-up. Built for designers.

item.title: Invoice Software for Developers
item.description: Retainer billing, milestone payments, GitHub integration, API/webhook billing. Built for developers.

item.title: Payment Reminder Email Scripts — 10 Templates
item.description: 10 scripts that work. Friendly, firm, and final notice templates. Copy-paste ready.

item.title: Late Fee Calculator — Exact Fees by Jurisdiction
item.description: Calculate exact late fees by amount, days late, and interest rate. Jurisdiction presets included.

item.title: PingPaid vs Competitors — Direct Comparison
item.description: Direct comparison: FreshBooks, Wave, QuickBooks, Zoho, PayPal. Feature table, pricing, verdict.
